title: prunus × lannesiana f. cataracta
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. cataracta is a hybrid of Prunus lannesiana and Prunus mume, commonly known as a flowering cherry tree. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its bark and flowers, which contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Prunus × lannesiana f. cataracta include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, protect against cell damage, and combat infections. Prunus × lannesiana f. cataracta is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
